Home / Departments / DoD / Military

DoD & Military
Construction

Mission-critical facilities and infrastructure delivered with the compliance, security, and precision that defense programs demand.

View Our Work Our Services
Overview

Department Overview

GMP's DoD/Military department delivers federal construction with a compliance-first approach built for the scrutiny defense programs demand. Our cleared personnel, UFC-aligned processes, and OCONUS/CONUS delivery experience mean facilities arrive mission-ready—with the documentation, security controls, and past performance record that keep programs on contract and on schedule.

Capabilities

What We Deliver

Military Construction (MILCON)

Purpose-built facilities meeting UFC/UFGS standards—barracks, maintenance bays, operations centers, and support infrastructure delivered to Unified Facilities Criteria.

Security Clearance Programs

Facility and personnel clearance coordination for classified environments, including SCIF construction, SAP spaces, and secure compartmented access controls.

Anti-Terrorism / Force Protection (AT/FP)

Blast-resistant design integration, progressive collapse mitigation, and setback-compliant site planning per DoD Minimum Antiterrorism Standards.

Past Performance Documentation

CPARS-ready records, past performance narrative development, and reference coordination that strengthen competitive federal proposals.

Contingency Construction

Rapid-deploy structures for forward operating bases, expeditionary medical facilities, and contingency basing needs with compressed mobilization timelines.

Base Operations Support

Operations and maintenance, sustainment planning, and life-cycle facility management that keep installations mission-capable year over year.

SECRET Clearance level
UFC Design standards
CPARS Performance tracking
Outcomes

Value We Create

Mission Readiness

Facilities delivered operational and compliant on day one—tested, commissioned, and ready to support the warfighter.

Security Compliance

SCIF, SAP, and classified space requirements met without schedule impact through early integration of ICD 705 and security engineering.

Federal Acquisition Fluency

FAR/DFARS, Davis-Bacon, Buy American, and trade agreement fluency embedded across every contract and subcontract tier.

Past Performance Record

Documented contract success with Exceptional and Very Good CPARS ratings supporting competitive proposals and task order awards.

Rapid Mobilization

Expeditionary capability from notice-to-proceed to beneficial occupancy—logistics, labor, and material pipelines pre-positioned for speed.

SCIF Secure facility delivery
FAR Acquisition compliance
AT/FP Force protection
NTP→BOD Fast mobilization

Ready to discuss your next DoD project?

From MILCON to contingency construction, we bring cleared personnel, compliance-first processes, and the past performance record your proposal needs.
